2603.17044.title: Do Understanding and Generation Fight? A Diagnostic Study of DPO for Unified Multimodal Models
2603.17044.paper_summary: Unified multimodal models share a language model backbone for both understanding and generating images. Can DPO align both capabilities simultaneously? We present the first systematic study of this question, applying DPO to Janus-Pro at 1B and 7B parameters under seven training strategies and two post-hoc methods. The central finding is negative: generation quality resists DPO alignment across all tested conditions on this architecture. No method improves generation CLIPScore at 7B (|Delta| < 0.2, p > 0.5 at n=200 per seed, 3 seeds); at 1B, all methods degrade generation, and the result holds across preference data types (real-vs-generated and model-vs-model) and the data volumes tested (150-288 pairs). Gradient analysis reveals why: understanding and generation gradients are near-orthogonal (cos ~ 0) with ~11-14x magnitude imbalance driven by VQ token count asymmetry (576 generation tokens vs. ~30-100 text tokens). This imbalance is the dominant interference mechanism in multi-task DPO; magnitude-balancing yields directionally positive understanding deltas (+0.01-0.04 VQA, though individually not significant), but the generation gap persists regardless. We identify discrete VQ tokenization as a likely structural bottleneck -- supported by the generation DPO loss converging to ln(2) -- and provide practical guidance for practitioners working with VQ-based unified models.
2603.17044.paper_summary_zh: 統一的多模態模型共享一個語言模型的骨幹，用於理解和生成圖像。DPO 能否同時對齊這兩種能力？我們針對這個問題進行了首次系統性的研究，將 DPO 應用於 Janus-Pro 的 1B 和 7B 參數，並在七種訓練策略和兩種後處理方法下進行實驗。主要發現是負面的：在這種架構下，生成質量在所有測試條件下都抵抗 DPO 對齊。沒有任何方法在 7B 下提高生成 CLIPScore（|Delta| < 0.2，p > 0.5，n=200 每種子，3 種子）；在 1B 下，所有方法都降低了生成質量，且該結果在偏好數據類型（真實與生成和模型與模型）及測試的數據量（150-288 對）中均成立。梯度分析揭示了原因：理解和生成的梯度幾乎是正交的（cos ~ 0），且由於 VQ 標記數量不對稱（576 生成標記對 ~30-100 文本標記），導致約 11-14 倍的幅度不平衡。這種不平衡是多任務 DPO 中的主要干擾機制；幅度平衡產生了方向性正向的理解增量（+0.01-0.04 VQA，儘管單獨來看並不顯著），但生成差距仍然存在。我們確定離散的 VQ 標記化是一個可能的結構瓶頸——這一點得到了生成 DPO 損失收斂到 ln(2) 的支持——並為使用基於 VQ 的統一模型的從業者提供了實用指導。
2603.17044.author: Abinav Rao et.al.
